CreateAssertion.name: CreateAssertion
CreateAssertion.documentation: Creates a resilience assertion for a service.

CreateInputSource.name: CreateInputSource
CreateInputSource.documentation: Creates an input source for a service.

CreatePolicy.name: CreatePolicy
CreatePolicy.documentation: Creates a resilience policy that defines availability and disaster recovery requirements.

CreateReport.name: CreateReport
CreateReport.documentation: On-demand report creation. Idempotent — duplicate requests with same clientToken return existing result.

CreateServiceFunction.name: CreateServiceFunction
CreateServiceFunction.documentation: Creates a service function within a service.

CreateSystem.name: CreateSystem
CreateSystem.documentation: Creates a system that represents a logical grouping of services.

CreateUserJourney.name: CreateUserJourney
CreateUserJourney.documentation: Creates a user journey within a system.

DeleteAssertion.name: DeleteAssertion
DeleteAssertion.documentation: Deletes a resilience assertion from a service.

ImportApp.name: ImportApp
ImportApp.documentation: Imports a V1 app into the V2 resource model, creating a service with the same name.

ImportPolicy.name: ImportPolicy
ImportPolicy.documentation: Imports a V1 policy into V2, mapping RTO/RPO values from V1 scenarios.

ListReports.name: ListReports
ListReports.documentation: List reports for a service, or all reports owned by the account if serviceArn is not provided.

availabilitySlo.documentation: The achievability status of the availability SLO target for the service.

multiAzRtoRpo.documentation: The achievability status of the multi-AZ RTO and RPO targets for the service.

multiRegionRtoRpo.documentation: The achievability status of the multi-Region RTO and RPO targets for the service.

Achievability.documentation: Describes the achievability status of a service's resilience targets based on the most recent assessment.

source.documentation: The source of the assertion, indicating whether it was AI-generated or created by a user.

createdAt.documentation: The timestamp when the assertion was created.

updatedAt.documentation: The timestamp when the assertion was last updated.

Assertion.documentation: Represents a resilience assertion for a service.

assertionId.documentation: The unique identifier of the created assertion.
The unique identifier of the deleted assertion.
The unique identifier of the updated assertion.

AssessmentCost.documentation: Represents the cost of running a failure mode assessment.

assessmentStep.documentation: The current step of the assessment process.

totalFindings.documentation: The total number of findings generated by the assessment.

errorMessage.documentation: A message describing the error if the assessment failed.

errorCode.documentation: The error code if the assessment failed.

billableAssessmentUnitCount.documentation: The number of billable assessment units consumed by the assessment.

AssessmentSummary.documentation: Contains summary information about a failure mode assessment.

userJourneyIds.documentation: The list of user journey identifiers that associate this system with the service.

AssociatedSystem.documentation: Represents a system associated with a service.

target.documentation: The target availability percentage, expressed as a value between 0 and 100.

AvailabilitySlo.documentation: Defines the availability service level objective (SLO) for a resilience policy.

inputSourceId.documentation: The unique identifier assigned to the created input source.

availabilitySlo.documentation: The availability SLO for the resilience policy.

multiAz.documentation: The multi-AZ disaster recovery targets for the resilience policy.

multiRegion.documentation: The multi-Region disaster recovery targets for the resilience policy.

dataRecovery.documentation: The data recovery targets for the resilience policy.

reportGenerationResult.documentation: The result of the report generation request.

criticality.documentation: The criticality level of the service function.

serviceFunctionId.documentation: The identifier of the service function to associate resources with.

resources.documentation: The list of resources to associate with the service function.
The list of resources that were associated.

associatedSystems.documentation: The systems to associate with the service.

regions.documentation: The AWS Regions where the service operates.

sharingEnabled.documentation: Indicates whether cross-account sharing is enabled for the system.

externalId.documentation: The external ID used for assuming the cross-account role.

CrossAccountRole.documentation: Specifies a cross-account IAM role ARN and optional external ID.

timeBetweenBackupsInMinutes.documentation: The target time between backups, in minutes.

DataRecoveryTargets.documentation: Defines data recovery targets for a resilience policy.

assertionId.documentation: The unique identifier of the assertion to delete.
The unique identifier of the deleted assertion.

inputSourceId.documentation: The identifier of the input source to delete.
The identifier of the deleted input source.

serviceFunctionId.documentation: The identifier of the service function to delete.
The identifier of the service function to remove resources from.

resources.documentation: The list of resources to remove from the service function.
The list of resources that were removed.

serviceFunctionId.documentation: The identifier of the deleted service function.

userJourneyId.documentation: The identifier of the user journey to delete.
The identifier of the deleted user journey.

updatedAt.documentation: The timestamp when dependency discovery was last updated.

DependencyDiscoveryConfig.documentation: Configuration for dependency discovery on a service.

DependencyDiscoveryInput.documentation: Caller-settable values for dependency discovery. INITIALIZING is system-managed.

dnsName.documentation: The DNS name associated with the dependency.

lastDetectedTime.documentation: The timestamp when the dependency was last detected.

sourceRegions.documentation: The source Regions from which the dependency was detected.

queryRange.documentation: The query range data for the dependency.

DependencySummary.documentation: Contains summary information about a discovered dependency.

source.documentation: Indicates whether the value comes from the service's own account or a cross-account policy.

DisasterRecoverySource.documentation: Contains the effective disaster recovery approach value for a service.

label.documentation: Human-readable relationship description. Only present for LLM-inferred edges.

EdgePropertySummary.documentation: Contains property information for a service topology edge.

availabilitySlo.documentation: The effective availability SLO value for the service.

multiAzRto.documentation: The effective multi-AZ RTO value for the service, in minutes.

multiAzRpo.documentation: The effective multi-AZ RPO value for the service, in minutes.

multiAzDrApproach.documentation: The effective multi-AZ disaster recovery approach for the service.

multiRegionRto.documentation: The effective multi-Region RTO value for the service, in minutes.

multiRegionRpo.documentation: The effective multi-Region RPO value for the service, in minutes.

multiRegionDrApproach.documentation: The effective multi-Region disaster recovery approach for the service.

dataRecoveryTimeBetweenBackups.documentation: The effective data recovery time between backups value for the service.

EffectivePolicyValues.documentation: Contains the effective resilience policy values for a service.

namespaces.documentation: The list of Kubernetes namespaces within the EKS cluster.

EksSource.documentation: Defines an Amazon EKS cluster and its namespaces as an input source for resource discovery.

EntityLabel.documentation: Entity label (not part of ARN — spaces allowed).

EntityName.documentation: Resource name (used in ARN — no spaces allowed).

type.documentation: The type of actor, either USER or SYSTEM.

accountId.documentation: The AWS account ID of the actor.

EventActor.documentation: Identifies the actor that triggered an event.

errorCode.documentation: The error code describing why the report generation failed.

errorMessage.documentation: The error message describing why the report generation failed.

serviceFunctions.documentation: The service functions associated with the finding.

policyComponent.documentation: The policy component associated with the finding.

infrastructureAndCodeRecommendations.documentation: Infrastructure and code recommendations to address the finding.

updatedAt.documentation: The timestamp when the finding was last updated.

Finding.documentation: Represents a resilience finding from a failure mode assessment.

policyComponent.documentation: The policy component associated with the finding.

updatedAt.documentation: The timestamp when the finding was last updated.

findingId.documentation: The unique identifier of the finding to retrieve.

userJourneyId.documentation: The identifier of the user journey to retrieve.

IamRoleArn.documentation: ARN of the IAM Role for the profile. Null if the permission profile is the 'Admin' profile.

IamRoleName.documentation: IAM role name (supports up to 64 characters per IAM limits).

skipManuallyAddedResources.documentation: Whether to skip manually added resources during import.

associatedSystems.documentation: The systems to associate with the imported service.

availabilitySlo.documentation: The availability SLO to set on the imported policy.

multiAzDisasterRecoveryApproach.documentation: The multi-AZ disaster recovery approach for the imported policy.

multiRegionDisasterRecoveryApproach.documentation: The multi-Region disaster recovery approach for the imported policy.

InfrastructureAndCodeRecommendation.documentation: An infrastructure and code recommendation to address a finding.

InputSource.documentation: Identifies an input source by its identifier and type.

inputSourceId.documentation: The unique identifier of the input source.

resourceTags.documentation: The resource tags used for discovery, if this input source uses tags.

eks.documentation: The Amazon EKS configuration, if this input source uses EKS.

createdAt.documentation: The timestamp when the input source was created.

InputSourceSummary.documentation: Contains summary information about an input source for a service.

KmsKeyId.documentation: KMS key identifier — accepts key ID, key ARN, alias name, or alias ARN.

queryRangeStartTime.documentation: The start time for the dependency query range.

queryRangeEndTime.documentation: The end time for the dependency query range.

queryRangeGranularity.documentation: The granularity for the dependency query range.

serviceArn.documentation: Optional. If not provided, lists all reports owned by the account.

serviceFunctionId.documentation: The service function identifier for the returned resources.

serviceTopologyEdgeSummaries.documentation: The list of service topology edge summaries.

rtoInMinutes.documentation: The recovery time objective (RTO) target for multi-AZ, in minutes.

rpoInMinutes.documentation: The recovery point objective (RPO) target for multi-AZ, in minutes.

MultiAzTargets.documentation: Defines the multi-AZ disaster recovery targets for a resilience policy.

rtoInMinutes.documentation: The recovery time objective (RTO) target for multi-Region, in minutes.

rpoInMinutes.documentation: The recovery point objective (RPO) target for multi-Region, in minutes.

MultiRegionTargets.documentation: Defines the multi-Region disaster recovery targets for a resilience policy.

ObservabilityRecommendation.documentation: An observability recommendation to address a finding.

crossAccountRoles.documentation: The list of cross-account IAM role ARNs.

PermissionModel.documentation: Defines the permission model for a service.

availabilitySlo.documentation: The availability SLO defined in the policy.

multiAz.documentation: The multi-AZ disaster recovery targets defined in the policy.

multiRegion.documentation: The multi-Region disaster recovery targets defined in the policy.

dataRecovery.documentation: The data recovery targets defined in the policy.

associatedServiceCount.documentation: The number of services associated with this policy.

createdAt.documentation: The timestamp when the policy was created.

updatedAt.documentation: The timestamp when the policy was last updated.

Policy.documentation: Represents a resilience policy that defines availability and disaster recovery requirements.

availabilitySlo.documentation: The availability SLO defined in the policy.

multiAz.documentation: The multi-AZ disaster recovery targets defined in the policy.

multiRegion.documentation: The multi-Region disaster recovery targets defined in the policy.

dataRecovery.documentation: The data recovery targets defined in the policy.

associatedServiceCount.documentation: The number of services associated with this policy.

createdAt.documentation: The timestamp when the policy was created.

updatedAt.documentation: The timestamp when the policy was last updated.

PolicySummary.documentation: Contains summary information about a resilience policy.

queryCount.documentation: The number of queries at this data point.

QueryDataPoint.documentation: A data point in a dependency query range.

startTime.documentation: The start time of the query range.

endTime.documentation: The end time of the query range.

granularity.documentation: The granularity of the query range data points.

dataPoints.documentation: The data points within the query range.

QueryRange.documentation: Defines a time range for dependency query data.

serviceArn.documentation: The service this report was generated for.

createdAt.documentation: The timestamp when the report was created.

reportOutput.documentation: Present when status is SUCCEEDED or FAILED.

s3ReportOutput.documentation: The S3 location where the report was written.

awsRegion.documentation: The AWS Region where the resource is located.

awsAccountId.documentation: The AWS account ID that owns the resource.

Resource.documentation: Represents an AWS resource discovered by Resilience Hub.

resourceTags.documentation: The resource tags for tag-based resource discovery.

eks.documentation: The Amazon EKS configuration for resource discovery.

ResourceConfiguration.documentation: Resource configuration for an input source. Provide exactly one field.

lastRunAt.documentation: The timestamp of the last resource discovery run.

errorCode.documentation: The error code if resource discovery failed.

errorMessage.documentation: A message describing the error if resource discovery failed.

ResourceDiscoveryStatus.documentation: Contains the status of resource discovery for a service.

resourceId.documentation: The identifier of the resource that was not found.

resourceType.documentation: The type of the resource that was not found.

ResourceTag.documentation: A tag key-value pair used for resource discovery.

S3BucketPath.documentation: S3 bucket path (with or without s3:// prefix).

s3ObjectKey.documentation: The S3 object key for the generated report.

bucketPath.documentation: S3 bucket path where reports will be written (e.g., my-bucket/ngrh-reports/).

bucketOwner.documentation: Account ID of the bucket owner for cross-account access verification.

S3Url.documentation: S3 URL — virtual hosted-style or s3:// URI.

regions.documentation: The AWS Regions where the service operates.

dependencyDiscovery.documentation: The dependency discovery configuration for the service.

effectivePolicyValues.documentation: The effective policy values for the service.

achievability.documentation: The achievability status of the service's resilience targets.

estimatedAssessmentCost.documentation: The estimated cost of running an assessment on the service.

resourceDiscovery.documentation: The resource discovery status for the service.

assessmentStatus.documentation: The current assessment status of the service.

rerunAssessment.documentation: Indicates whether the assessment should be rerun.

openFindingsCount.documentation: The number of open findings for the service.

resolvedFindingsCount.documentation: The number of resolved findings for the service.

organizationId.documentation: The AWS Organizations identifier for the service.

ouId.documentation: The organizational unit (OU) identifier for the service.

accountId.documentation: The AWS account ID that owns the service.

createdAt.documentation: The timestamp when the service was created.

updatedAt.documentation: The timestamp when the service was last updated.

Service.documentation: Represents a service in Resilience Hub. A service is the primary unit of resilience assessment.

assessmentId.documentation: The assessment identifier that triggered the update.

availabilitySlo.documentation: The updated achievability status of the availability SLO.

multiAzRtoRpo.documentation: The updated achievability status of the multi-AZ RTO and RPO targets.

multiRegionRtoRpo.documentation: The updated achievability status of the multi-Region RTO and RPO targets.

serviceFunctionCreated.documentation: Metadata for a service function created event.

serviceFunctionUpdated.documentation: Metadata for a service function updated event.

serviceAchievabilityUpdated.documentation: Metadata for a service achievability updated event.

ServiceEventMetadata.documentation: Type-specific metadata for each service event type.

serviceFunctionId.documentation: The unique identifier of the service function.

criticality.documentation: The criticality level of the service function.

resourceCount.documentation: The number of resources associated with the service function.

createdAt.documentation: The timestamp when the service function was created.

updatedAt.documentation: The timestamp when the service function was last updated.

ServiceFunction.documentation: Represents a logical component of a service.

serviceFunctionId.documentation: The identifier of the created service function.

resourcesAdded.documentation: The list of resource ARNs that were added.

ServiceFunctionResourcesAddedMetadata.documentation: Metadata for a service function resources added event.

resourcesRemoved.documentation: The list of resource ARNs that were removed.

ServiceFunctionResourcesRemovedMetadata.documentation: Metadata for a service function resources removed event.

resourcesAdded.documentation: The list of resource ARNs that were added.

resourcesRemoved.documentation: The list of resource ARNs that were removed.

ServiceFunctionUpdatedMetadata.documentation: Metadata for a service function updated event.

ServiceInputSourcesUpdatedMetadata.documentation: Metadata for a service input sources updated event.

ServicePolicyAssociatedMetadata.documentation: Metadata for a service policy associated event.

ServicePolicyDisassociatedMetadata.documentation: Metadata for a service policy disassociated event.

ServiceReference.documentation: A reference to a service by ID and name.

added.documentation: The list of service references that were added.

removed.documentation: The list of service references that were removed.

ServiceReportConfiguration.documentation: Configuration for automatic report generation on a Service.

inputSource.documentation: The input source that discovered the resource.

ServiceResource.documentation: Represents a resource associated with a service.

ServiceResourcesAssociatedMetadata.documentation: Metadata for a service resources associated event.

regions.documentation: The AWS Regions where the service operates.

updatedAt.documentation: The timestamp when the service was last updated.

ServiceSystemAssociatedMetadata.documentation: Metadata for a service system associated event.

ServiceTopologyEdgeSummary.documentation: Contains summary information about a service topology edge.

ServiceWorkflowUpdatedMetadata.documentation: Metadata for a service workflow updated event.

source.documentation: Indicates whether the value comes from the service's own account or a cross-account policy.

SloSource.documentation: Contains the effective availability SLO value and its source.

assessmentId.documentation: The unique identifier of the started assessment.

StringChange.documentation: Describes a change from one string value to another.

organizationId.documentation: The AWS Organizations identifier for the system.

ouId.documentation: The organizational unit (OU) identifier for the system.

createdAt.documentation: The timestamp when the system was created.

updatedAt.documentation: The timestamp when the system was last updated.

System.documentation: Represents a system in Resilience Hub. A system is a logical grouping of services.

SystemEvent.documentation: Represents an event in the system event log.

SystemEventDetails.documentation: Contains the details of a system event.

systemUserJourneyCreated.documentation: Metadata for a system user journey created event.

systemUserJourneyUpdated.documentation: Metadata for a system user journey updated event.

systemUserJourneyDeleted.documentation: Metadata for a system user journey deleted event.

systemServiceAssociated.documentation: Metadata for a system service associated event.

systemServiceDisassociated.documentation: Metadata for a system service disassociated event.

systemPolicyAssociated.documentation: Metadata for a system policy associated event.

systemPolicyDisassociated.documentation: Metadata for a system policy disassociated event.

SystemId.documentation: System ID for cross-account use without exposing account structure.

userJourneys.documentation: The user journeys linking the service to the system.

SystemServiceAssociatedMetadata.documentation: Metadata for a system service associated event.

userJourneysAffected.documentation: The user journeys affected by the disassociation.

SystemServiceDisassociatedMetadata.documentation: Metadata for a system service disassociated event.

userJourneysCount.documentation: The number of user journeys in the system.

SystemUserJourneyCreatedMetadata.documentation: Metadata for a system user journey created event.

userJourneyName.documentation: The name of the deleted user journey.

associatedServicesAtDeletion.documentation: The services that were associated at the time of deletion.

SystemUserJourneyDeletedMetadata.documentation: Metadata for a system user journey deleted event.

userJourneyName.documentation: The name of the updated user journey.

changes.documentation: The changes made to the user journey.

SystemUserJourneyUpdatedMetadata.documentation: Metadata for a system user journey updated event.

value.documentation: The RTO or RPO value in minutes.

source.documentation: Indicates whether the value comes from the service's own account or a cross-account policy.

TargetSource.documentation: Contains an effective RTO or RPO value and its source.

TestingRecommendation.documentation: A testing recommendation to address a finding.

retryAfterSeconds.documentation: The number of seconds to wait before retrying the request.

tagKeys.documentation: The tag keys to remove from the resource.

assertionId.documentation: The unique identifier of the assertion to update.

text.documentation: The updated text content of the assertion.

dependencyId.documentation: The identifier of the dependency to update.

criticality.documentation: The updated criticality level of the dependency.

multiAz.documentation: The updated multi-AZ disaster recovery targets for the policy.

multiRegion.documentation: The updated multi-Region disaster recovery targets for the policy.

dataRecovery.documentation: The updated data recovery targets for the policy.

The unique identifier of the user journey.

createdAt.documentation: The timestamp when the user journey was created.

updatedAt.documentation: The timestamp when the user journey was last updated.

UserJourney.documentation: Represents a user journey that defines a critical path through a system.

associatedServices.documentation: Changes to the services associated with the user journey.

UserJourneyChanges.documentation: Describes changes made to a user journey.

userJourneyId.documentation: The unique identifier of the user journey.

fieldList.documentation: The list of fields that failed validation.

name.documentation: The name of the field that failed validation.

message.documentation: The validation error message for the field.

documentation: The next generation of AWS Resilience Hub is the single location in AWS where you assess and improve the resilience of your critical applications. It helps Site Reliability Engineers (SREs) and development teams proactively reason about resilience at scale — identifying failure modes, discovering hidden dependencies, and report on progress across the enterprise.
